name: Rainbow Fighter
short_description: This is a fast-paced flying shooting game.
detailed_description:
This is a fast-paced flying shooting game.

I hope you can experience the pleasure of 2D game control through 3D gaming.

feature:

A combination of pixel and lowpoly art styles.

Carefully design main levels with different styles to experience the fun of different levels such as space, magma, snow mountains, bases, etc. 2.5D and 3D levels can be switched between each other.

Support local two-player cooperation.

There are many different capabilities and missiles, wingman combinations, lasers, tracking rounds, etc.

Combined with the energy system to release powerful skills, it can also be used as a shield and dodge to avoid enemy barrages.

Most of the tracks were composed by me based on the level scenarios.

Drive your fighter plane and join this space journey! ! !

My X  MGameBox。 Welcome to communicate together
